hypothesis: Conditioning CompGen on the active-site motif (atop/bridge/hollow) and the mean adsorbate–first-shell metal distance, in addition to adsorbate identity, target adsorption energy, and allowed elements, will reduce shell-2 composition Leakage by at least 25% and Fréchet Distance by at least 15% on the HEA test set under zero-shot transfer relative to the original model.
